hero.tagline: Hub support for clients from all over the world.
hero.subtext: We help Bangladeshi e-commerce and retail brands launch fast, modern, conversion-focused websites and brands - premium-quality work without the premium price tag.

meetMinds.heading: Meet the Minds Behind the Work.
meetMinds.body: At Devorica, we bring together developers, designers, and strategists across Laravel, Python, Node.js, React, TypeScript, Java, and Flutter to craft bold, fast, reliable digital products. We're a small team with big ambition - and every project gets our full focus.

hiddenCost.heading: The Hidden Cost of a
hiddenCost.body: Businesses lose customers every day to slow, outdated, or poorly designed digital experiences. For e-commerce and retail brands competing on conversion, every week without a strong online presence compounds into real, measurable lost revenue. Your website is your most powerful sales tool - or your most expensive liability.

card1.title: Web Development
card1.subtitle: Fast, Scalable, Reliable.
card1.desc: Custom websites & web apps built with the right stack for the job - Laravel, Node.js, React, or beyond. We pick the right tool for your project, not a one-size-fits-all template.

card2.title: UI/UX Design
card2.subtitle: Design That Converts.
card2.desc: Interfaces that are both beautiful and intuitive - crafted with user psychology, conversion principles, and brand coherence in mind from the very first pixel.

card3.title: Branding & Identity
card3.subtitle: Brands People Remember.
card3.desc: Logo, visual identity systems, typography, color, and brand guidelines - everything you need to show up consistently and confidently across every touchpoint.

card4.title: Digital Strategy & Growth
card4.subtitle: Less Guesswork. More Growth.
card4.desc: SEO, conversion rate optimization, and performance strategy grounded in data - so your digital presence doesn't just exist, it produces measurable results.

testimonial1.name: CodeVibe
testimonial1.quote: They provide good services, but responses are a little bit slow. Other than that, the working experience is very good and much better than many other Bangladeshi agencies.

testimonial2.name: Ratul Mart
testimonial2.quote: Devorica built exactly the website I was looking for. The design is clean, professional, and their attention to detail is spot on. Replies were sometimes a bit slow, but they always got back to me and resolved every issue. Very satisfied with the final product and would definitely work with them again.

testimonial3.name: Digital Dynamo
testimonial3.quote: Devorica delivered an exceptional website - premium feel, smooth on mobile, and they were genuinely attentive throughout the process. They welcomed every revision with patience and continued to support us even after launch. A truly professional agency that punches well above its weight.

barriers.heading: Identify the Barriers
barriers.body: Slow load times, dated design, and unclear messaging are silently costing you customers. Devorica exists to tear down those barriers - fast.

process.heading: A Streamlined Process for
process.step1Desc: We start by deeply understanding your business, goals, and audience. No templates, no assumptions - just a tailored project brief built around what you actually need.
process.step2Desc: Our team designs pixel-perfect interfaces and builds them with clean, maintainable code using whatever stack your project demands - all with transparent progress updates.
process.step3Desc: We handle the launch - testing, optimization, and deployment - then stay available for ongoing support, growth strategy, and iterative improvements.

project1.name: bikkhipto.com
project1.desc: A custom e-commerce platform built for performance and ease of use, tailored for the Bangladeshi retail market.

project2.name: easysubbd.com
project2.desc: A subscription-based service web platform with seamless UX and a conversion-focused design flow.

project3.name: bayloz.com
project3.desc: A modern digital commerce experience with custom branding, responsive design, and smooth mobile navigation.

finalCta.heading: Take the Next Step Toward
finalCta.subtext: Let's build something remarkable together - on time, on budget, and built to last.

servicesPage.heroSubtext: From Laravel and Node.js backends to React and Flutter front-ends, we build with whatever stack the project actually needs - not a one-size-fits-all template.
servicesPage.pricingSubtext: No hidden fees. No surprise invoices. Just clear tiers built around what your business actually needs.
servicesPage.payment: Accepted payment: bKash · Nagad · Bank Transfer · PayPal / Stripe

aboutPage.heroSubtext: A Bangladeshi design and development agency founded in 2022, based in Noakhali - building premium digital products for the brands that deserve them.
aboutPage.storyBody: Devorica was founded in 2022 with a clear mission: to prove that premium-quality digital work doesn't require a premium-sized budget. Based in Manikpur, Senbag, Noakhali, Bangladesh, we serve local e-commerce and retail brands as well as international clients who need genuine craft - not off-the-shelf templates.
aboutPage.missionBody: Agency-grade design, without agency-grade price tags. We believe every business - from a Bangladeshi SME to a growing international brand - deserves a digital presence that works hard, looks exceptional, and builds real trust with customers.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We keep you in the loop at every stage. No jargon, no radio silence - just clear, honest updates from brief to launch.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Our tiers are clearly defined and our quotes are fixed. You'll never receive a surprise invoice.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We meet deadlines. When something comes up, we communicate early - never after the fact.
aboutPage.value4Desc: We refuse to ship mediocre work. Every pixel is considered, every interaction is intentional.
aboutPage.teamSubtext: We're a focused team of developers, designers, and strategists - small enough to give your project real attention, experienced enough to deliver results that matter.

contactPage.heroSubtext: Whether you're starting from scratch or need to take your existing presence to the next level - we're ready to talk.
contactPage.formSuccess: Thanks - we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
contactPage.formError: Something went wrong. Please try reaching us via WhatsApp or email.
contactPage.faq1Q: How long does a typical project take?
contactPage.faq1A: Most websites are delivered within 2–6 weeks depending on scope. We'll give you a clear timeline in our initial proposal - and we stick to it.
contactPage.faq2Q: Do you offer support after launch?
contactPage.faq2A: Yes. All tiers include at least 1 week of post-launch support, and our Growth and Enterprise tiers include extended support periods. We also offer ongoing retainer arrangements.
contactPage.faq3Q: What's included in your pricing tiers?
contactPage.faq3A: Every tier is fully documented on our Services page with a clear deliverables list. There are no hidden add-ons - what you see is what you get.
contactPage.faq4Q: Can you work with an existing brand/design, or only build from scratch?
contactPage.faq4A: Both. We're happy to build on an existing brand identity or start completely fresh - we'll adapt our process to where you are today.
contactPage.faq5Q: Do you take on e-commerce projects specifically?
contactPage.faq5A: Absolutely - e-commerce and retail brands are our primary focus. We have deep experience with conversion-focused e-commerce design and custom platform builds.

notFound.subtext: This page wandered off - let's get you back on track.

cookie.text: We use cookies for analytics (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel) and live chat (Tawk.to) to improve your experience.

exitIntent.heading: Wait - get a free consultation.
exitIntent.subtext: Share your email and we'll reach out within 24 hours to discuss your project - no commitment required.
